content.sentence: ___ ấy là giáo sư nổi tiếng.

exampleSentencesTranslated: My grandfather really likes to tell old stories to his grandchildren.
Every weekend, I usually go for a walk with my grandfather around the park near our house.
She gave her grandfather a hand-knitted scarf for his birthday.
notes_md:
**ông** usually means **grandfather**. It refers to your father’s or mother’s father.

It’s a noun, and you don’t usually need a classifier; just say *ông*. For an elderly man in general, you can also use it politely, especially when talking to or about someone older.

It often pairs with **bà** (grandmother / elderly woman) as **ông bà** = grandparents.  

It can also mean **husband** in a married couple when paired with **bà** (like “the husband”).
notes:
ông usually means grandfather. It refers to your father’s or mother’s father.

It’s a noun, and you don’t usually need a classifier; just say ông. For an elderly man in general, you can also use it politely, especially when talking to or about someone older.

It often pairs with bà (grandmother / elderly woman) as ông bà = grandparents.  

It can also mean husband in a married couple when paired with bà (like “the husband”).
exampleSentences: Ông của anh rất thích kể chuyện ngày xưa cho các cháu nghe.
Mỗi cuối tuần, em thường cùng ông đi dạo quanh công viên gần nhà.
Chị đã tặng ông một chiếc khăn len tự đan vào dịp sinh nhật.

content.sentence: ___ ấy là giáo sư nổi tiếng.

definitions.es: Un término utilizado para referirse a un hombre mayor, a menudo un abuelo o anciano.
definitions.en: A term used to refer to an older man, often a grandfather or elder.
definitions.vi: Một thuật ngữ dùng để chỉ một người đàn ông lớn tuổi, thường là ông nội hoặc người lớn tuổi.
